title: CcxtCandleFeed with watch_ohlcv for Binance + Bybit

acceptance_criteria_check.evidence: src/kairon/live/feed.py created; CcxtCandleFeed consumes ccxt.async_support.watch_ohlcv on Binance and Bybit via the extended CCXTAdapter.watch_ohlcv.

src/kairon/data/adapters/ccxt_adapter.py::CCXTAdapter.watch_ohlcv added; wraps underlying client.watch_ohlcv and emits one-row OHLCV_SCHEMA pyarrow tables to a typed callback. Existing afetch/fetch methods unchanged.

tests/live/test_ccxt_feed.py::test_1m_candle_round_trip passes; feeds 3 successive 1m ticks in the same 60s bucket, asserts exactly 1 closed bucket row, asserts OHLCV_SCHEMA, asserts aclose() is idempotent (close.await_count == 1 across two calls).

Implementation uses ccxt.async_support.watch_ohlcv only; no ccxt.pro import. Supported venues restricted to Binance and Bybit (CcxtCandleFeed.SUPPORTED_VENUES); other CryptoVenue values are rejected at construction.
Real-data capture deferred per W0 BTC-only fallback (reports/w0_fallback.md). Test is fully hermetic. See reports/w1_1_network_unavailable.md for the one-paragraph explanation.

notes: W1.1 ships the public-WS path. ccxt.pro upgrade is a future 1-PR change per the plan. The ccxt_client seam (src/kairon/data/adapters/_ccxt_client.py) is reused unchanged.
